title: Creative Blocks & Items
description: Make your builds actually stand out, and be more creative with new simple and cool blocks this mod adds! Theyre vanilla friendly and textures are good.
body:
Make your builds actually **stand out**, and be more creative with new simple and cool blocks this mod adds! Theyre vanilla friendly and textures are good. This mod is made for builders who are seeking for just blocks that are a little bit better.

_You can try to go on newer versions, but I just put 1.21-1.21.1 because its 100% confirmed that it works on those 2 versions_
